name: Bartenura Mimosa Cans
description: Effortlessly refreshing and bursting with sun-drenched flavor, this vibrant blend pairs the crisp, floral notes of our signature Moscato with the bright, zesty essence of real orange juice. Delicately sweet with a lively fizz, it delivers a clean, citrusy finish that feels like brunch in a can. No need for pitchers or peeling -just chill, pop the top, and enjoy the perfect pour every time!

name: Bartenura Peach Bellini
description: A classic Italian aperitivo reimagined. This elegant peach and wine cocktail blends the natural sweetness of sun-ripened peaches with sparkling wine, delivering the timeless taste of Venice in every sip. Imported from Italy, each can offers a perfectly balanced, refreshing experience with the sophisticated charm of a traditional Bellini. Simply chill and enjoy la dolce vita.
